entry.title: How to Activate only a specific range of Subscriber Accounts
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

in a SAP CC 5.0.6 having a single catalog where we have two ranges of subscriber accounts:

  • 9900XXXXX - range of subscriber accounts for service provider 1
  • 1100XXXXX - range of subscriber accounts for service provider 2

We stopped the automatic contract activation (by setting the ACTIVATION_SCHEDULER_ENABLED = FALSE). We need to activate all the subscriber accounts starting with the range 9900XXXXXX without activating the other subscriber accounts. 

Unfortunately, the start_contract_activation does not support any kind of filter (as you can enter only the Ref Date and the Max Throughput). 

Is there any other option how to bulk activate them without the need to develop a program that calls the activation web service of CC with the chargingContractActivate service operation in bulk for all the contracts?

Any suggestion/hint is highly appreciated.

Thank you,

Doris

entry.title: Re: How to Activate only a specific range of Subscriber A...
entry.content:
Hello, 

the only way is to use the web service, see Activate charging contracts in bulk. There is no other way to do it.

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Gl balances and asset history AR02
entry.content:
It seems we have similar threads that could help you, kindly check:

 

Solved: Difference between FA & GL Balance - SAP Community

Asset value not updated in asset accounting - SAP Community

 

BR,

 

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: C4C Version 2 - Account's duplicate check
entry.content: Any updates on this subject !!

entry.title: Re: Objects are imported but not generated when moved to production system
entry.content: Why are they not successfully imported and generated? Did you check the transport log and the SAP notes? Or contact SAP Support? After fixing it, import the transport request again.

entry.title: How to define correct FI organizational structure to suitable for customer's require?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I studied a lot about FI organizational structure and integration structure, but I am very confused about how to define correct FI organization, is suitable for a customer's business. I still can not understand clearly about the concepts of organizational structure of SAP.
Let me give you a case study:
My customer has 3 branches in the same country. They want a company code for the parent company, the subsidiaries will be profit centers. They asked us to come up with solutions and analyze advantages and disadvantage? I feel very helpless in this case.

Through this case, Can you explain the criteria to define an organizational structure. What are the important implications and recommendations when building an organizational structure?

------ I am a junior, I'm thankful to everyone for reading my post. Have a good day. -------

#SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN (Finance) #SAP FI #Organization structure

entry.title: Re: How to define correct FI organizational structure to suitable for customer's require?
entry.content:
Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in ERP Q&A or Financial  Management Q&A: Enterprise Resource Planning Q&A | SAP Community or Financial Management Q&A | SAP Community.

NB: hopefully, moderators fix it for you from time to time.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
Hi @SBach ,

I have used below code in IF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_RUN_APPL_STEP~ON_CREATION_CALLBACK.

 

data itab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gnetw.
    APPEND 30 to itab.
    APPEND 40 to itab.
    DATA(lo_container) = io_context->get_task_container( ).
    lo_container->set( EXPORTING name = 'Amount'
                         value = itab ).

 

 But the task container in the workflow log shows same value in both the runtime instances of the task.

 

Also I used the amount expression in the workitem text, however it did not update the workitem text as seen in the workflow log screenshot above.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content:
Hello Ryan, I tried with several formats suggested by SAP notes.
with the note KBA 2933028 , I also tried with my first attempt with this filter condition
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'BTP_DEV_USER' and (CreationDate eq datetimeoffset'2021-01-05T15:16:23'))
it didn't work out.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

entry.title: Re: Report for Creation and Change of master data History...
entry.content:
Hello Krishna,

For the bank :

Data source FINHBACTB -- shows the detiails of the bank account. However this does not show change history or creation  / Changed details.

For Supplier and Customer, you can use Change collector under application and user management. That gives you all the details of the changes performed for selection (Similar to changes tab in the supplier)

Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: Execute CHBD in background
entry.content: We have similar requirement where we want to automate the proposal of next bin during the Exception code

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
hello All,

I am located at Pune , the culturally rich & technologically advanced city in India.

Originally I from Mumbai,it's twin city , where I was born & bought up.

I have migrated to Pune 6 years back for good.

I loved Pune, for it's pleasant ,cool weather, relatively lesser people congestion as compared to Mumbai or other populated cities, for it's IT HUB and automotive manufacturing companies & overall other oppournities that it offers.

Also it's famous for it's culture & heritage.

I have joined the world of SAP in July 2007, when my organisation gave an oppournity to it non-sap employees to shift into SAP. We were given SAP classroom training sponsored by company after which we gave SAP certification exam.

Since then it's been a roller coaster ride in SAP across 3 organisations, working on multiple clients for SAP implementation projects.

Every passing year, SAP world seems to grow & we keep learning, hearing new things.

I feel happy to join this SAP blogger community so that I can learn from others and contribute by posting SAP blogs.

Thanks 

Umesh Karane.

Pune,India

entry.title: Re: Request for digital skills initiative by SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hi @mohanpriya ,

Please go through the open sap and learning hub courses . these are very helpful . 

Regards ,

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: Click to expand subreport
entry.content: This is a great help.. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Code Descriptions in Reports out of EC
entry.content: check screenshot FYR.

entry.title: Re: storie report position
entry.content:
Not providing exact details...

This can be done by creating a calculated column based on the Effective Start Date of the position when vacant. In other words, it would be the days between the Effective Start Date and Today(). I would need to do some testing to see if you can get more sophisticated per your requirement of Months & Days.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Cairo (Egypt) 2024
entry.content:
Join the SAP Inside Track Event in Cairo, Egypt!

This is a fantastic opportunity to connect with fellow SAP enthusiasts, learn from Industry experts, dive deep into the latest trends and innovations with in the SAP ecosystem. Whether you're an experienced SAP professional or just starting in the field, this meetup promises valuable takeaways and fosters connection.

Agenda Themes:
1. GEN AI on SAP
2. Rise with SAP
3. Grow with SAP
4. SAP BTP
5. Sustainability

Date: Saturday, July 20, 2024
Time: 10:30 AM to 4:00 PM Cairo Time
Location:  Sofitel Cairo Nile El Gezirah

Registration: We need you for our agenda! This is your moment to share with the SAP Community in Egypt a topic from the Agenda Themes!

Submit your session here: https://forms.gle/q5cZL9S6Lsjy5Hnf8 

After we receive your submission, the team will make up the agenda and come back to you. We will keep the submission open till July 1st.

The earlier we can make the agenda the earlier we can share it with you! 

Don’t miss out this exciting opportunity to be part of the SAP Community in Cairo, Egypt. We look forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

Firstly, kudos to SAP for providing such a great opportunity to learn and get certified free of cost. I identify as a woman and have always found ERP fascinating. Currently, I'm on a career break, however I have been part of multiple implementations and system conversions for SAP HCM and SAP Finance programs. The digital skills initiative is a fantastic opportunity that will definitely help me up skill and open up many more opportunities in the future. Currently, I'm pursing SAP Activate methodology which I would like to get certified for.

I look forward to hearing from you. Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content: @satsunros your filter is incorrect because you are using datetimeoffset without an offset, and you also used eq which means only if an order has that exact timestamp. Change your filter to $filter=CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and CreationDate ge datetime'2021-01-05T:00:00:00' and you would get results for all orders created after 01/05/2021

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
hello SAP community!!!!

Originally I am originally from Mumbai, Pune'  twin city in INDIA, where I was born & bought up.

I have migrated to Pune 6 years back for good.

I love  Pune, for it's pleasant ,cool weather, relatively lesser people congestion as compared to Mumbai or other populated cities, for it's IT HUB and automotive manufacturing companies & overall other oppournities that it offers.

Also it's famous for it's culture & heritage.

I have joined the world of SAP in July 2007, since then it's been a roller coaster ride in SAP across 3 Global  organizations', working on some bigger accounts on 1 ECC and 3 S4 HANA implementation project.

I have enjoyed the SAP journey so far & excited for the time ahead!!!

SAP always bring new things to learn and grow for it's consultants .

And SAP Community platform is a excellent way to be in touch in the SAP fellow consultants 

to share NEWS,VIEWS on various SAP products.

I feel happy to join this SAP blogger community so that I can learn from others and contribute by posting SAP blogs.

Thanks 

Umesh Karane.

Certified SAP s4 HANA Sales Associate.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Difference between Quantity Confirmaion and...
entry.content:
Hi,

"Production Order Quantity Confirmation" is triggered from order-based flow in Order POD using Quantity Confirmation POD Plugin or APIs and does not trigger GR, as GR is posted in Order POD separately.

"Production Order Yield Confirmation" is triggered from SFC-based flow in Work Center / Operation Activity PODs once SFC is completed at a given operation if the operation is marked as a SAP ERP reporting step and GR is triggered if that specific operation is marked as "Last Reporting Activity" in the routing.

See:

For "Production Order Quantity Confirmation"

Posting Quantity Confirmation
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/posting-quantity-confirmation-5855e3b72fa14dc2a38d608e0584e727
Creating Goods Receipt
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-goods-receipt-95b80983c3174ce1a9cb6caef8a678e7

For "Production Order Yield Confirmation"
Production Yield Confirmation on Operation Complete
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/integration-guide/production-yield-confirmation-on-operation-complete
Creating Goods Receipt
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-goods-receipt

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: RAR- How to migrate orders to RAR
entry.content: Classic

Thanks in advance!

Has anyone perhaps found a solution for this?

I was wondering if CSS is capable of influencing the sort order of values in a dropdown field? @Arne_Manthey do you know if that is possible?

Kr

Joyca

entry.title: Re: Fill data for Journal entry item custom fields
entry.content:
Hello,

Hello, 

If you have already added the custom fields to the Journal entry item level, and are able to fill in the new entries using a custom logic, updating existing records should be possible using ABAP Development Tools (ADT).

Here are the steps you can follow to update the existing records:

1. Ensure that the custom fields are added to the relevant structures in the ABAP Dictionary. You can do this using transaction code SE11.

2. After adding the custom fields to the structures GLItems and APARItems, you need to adjust the logic in your Cloud BADI extension to also update these fields for the existing records.

3. Use ADT to create an ABAP program that retrieves the existing journal entries and updates the custom fields using the custom logic you have implemented.

4. Use the appropriate data manipulation statements in your ABAP program to update the existing records with the new custom field values.

5. Test your ABAP program thoroughly to ensure that it updates the existing records as expected.

By following these steps, you should be able to update the existing records with the custom field values using ABAP Development Tools. If you encounter any specific issues during this process, you can consult the SAP documentation or reach out to the SAP community for further assistance.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Can I use Linked Images instead table in word SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello Felipe,

The main difference is, that you cannot tag an image. So, for any type of iXBRL scenario, I would not advise using images.

I will send you a document on Linked Images

 

Marc

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Thanks for the introduction @umeshkarane - great to have you here and hope you enjoy exploring SAP Community.

entry.title: Conversion from SAP ECC to S/4HOP - Company not linked to Controlling Area
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we are preparing the migration from a classic ERP 6.0 System to S/4HANA 2023 or higher (depending on the project timing).

In the system we have one controlling area with some company code assigned, but we also have some company code active but not relevant for controlling, not assigned to any controlling area. They are just used for GL journal entries.

What should we do ?

1) Assign the company codes to the controlling area BEFORE the conversion, creating almost one cost center for postings on cost elements?

2) Nothing to do before the conversion, the conversion procedure will drive us to perform the required settings, if any ?

Thanks in advance for your support

Sabrina

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

It was during my 3rd year of my Engineering college ,that i heard of "SAP" for 1st time, around 1997.

Then it was very high buzz word in the ERP industry. At that time, i never thought of any chance of going into it, but only admired it.

Later in July 2007 when I got an  oppournity in my organisation to shift into SAP, i was eager to go for it.

Thanks & Regards,

Umesh Karane.

SAP S4hana sales Certified Associate.

Since then it's been a roller coaster ride in SAP across 3 organisations, working on multiple clients for SAP implementation projects.

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh Retired
entry.content:
Hello yogananda, we activated a FREE service plan for Integration Suite (Free Tier), which should contain FREE Event Mesh also (see SAP Discovery Center), but we do not see the Event Mesh anywhere in the environment of Integration Suite. We are on account region, where it should be available see OSS note "3461547 - SAP Integration Suite : Restrictions for Event Mesh Capability".

So how can we activate it in FREE Integration Suite? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Inside SAP: Our Cloud Business Journey’s Impact on Enterprise Architecture
entry.content:
At SAP, our enterprise architecture is evolving on our own business transformation journey to the cloud. Learn how our digital IT organization supports our business as we move to cloud-based business models and evolve our enterprise architecture strategy.

Event Link

entry.title: SAP Companion Integration
entry.content: I'm trying to do custom integration onto a sidebar I've created in a SAP UI5 site, I know it's possible to integrate the Enable Now icon onto my custom sidebar. But is it possible to integrate Guided Tour/ Help Topic icons onto the custom sidebar? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unable to access Code List Description of Custom Fiel...
entry.content:
Hello, 
I am not sure, if this help, but maybe you can roughly have a look at the following steps:

1. First, make sure that the user has the necessary authorizations to access the custom field and its description in the CDS view.

2. Check if the custom field and its description are properly exposed in the CDS view. The code list field should be properly mapped and exposed in the CDS view definition.

3. Ensure that the CDS view is activated and properly released for use in other apps.

4. If the standard association is not allowed to access the description, you may need to create a custom association in the CDS view that links the custom field to its description.

5. Check if there are any restrictions or configuration settings that prevent access to the custom field description in the CDS view. Sometimes, there might be specific settings or restrictions at the field level that prevent its usage in other apps.

Let me know, if this helps, else I can also check further. 
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Hi @PeterGutsche , regarding this statement:

"Regular expressions were excluded for the Integration Packages feature to avoid conflicts with expressions defined at artifact level. As integration package- and artifact-level access policies co-exist, this limitation was introduced to avoid conflicting expressions."

I really think SAP did things the other way around... Starting with authorizations at package level is way more convenient and important. The way to avoid conflict if SAP still wants to limit at each object type is to use a hierarchical approach. So first the Package access needs to be evaluated and then the object inside it...

In any case, most companies can't really maintain access policies at object level like "Data Type" and so on, so it's nice to have but I would prefer to disable this feature and enable Package access with "Matches".

If you don't want to use "Matches" for the package name, then my proposal which is probably better is to control with "tags". We already use tags in my company to identify the packages of the different teams, this way the packages don't necessarily need to have the team name as a prefix. So if I add the "team name tag" to the package then I can easily search and should be able to control access with it.

entry.title: Inside SAP: How We Run SAP Business Technology Platform at Scale
entry.content: SAP can scale from individual applications to over 500 applications, keeping costs, resources, and maintenance to a minimum. See how we use the latest SAP Business Technology Platform technologies, AI capabilities, and agile methodologies to optimize operations, increase developer efficiency, and accelerate innovation as a large-scale enterprise.

entry.title: Busqueda formateada en HANA
entry.content:
Buenos días:
Por favor les agradeceré me ayuden a convertir una instrucción SQL para que funcione en SAP Business One HANA:

SELECT CASE WHEN $[$38.58] < $[$38.56] THEN $[$38.56] ELSE $[$38.58] END

Es el documento "Cotización-Cliente", donde el "Precio Venta" no debe ser menor al "Precio de Coste Ingreso Bruto".

Muchas gracias de antemano

entry.title: Inside SAP: Discover How SAP Accelerates Business Using SAP Build Solutions
entry.content: Boost business agility and reduce development efforts using the potential of SAP Build solutions. Experience how SAP’s internal IT team builds apps without writing code, uses AI-driven code-development support, automates workflow processes, and designs central business sites to unleash the power of SAP Build.

entry.content:
hello SAP community members,

Is there any SAP configuration guide/ documentation available if we want to adopt SAP Joule in our current implemented / running S4HANA sales System? i.e want to utilise the power of AI tool  Joule to empower our client to run it's business more faster and bring a entire new user experience in their SAP life?

Your response will be highly appreciated.

Umesh Karane

entry.title: Help with formula
entry.content:
Hello,

To display today's date, I have used this formula:

The result will be: 11 Jun.
What formula should I use to display tomorrow's date (12 Jun) or yesterday's date (10 Jun)?

entry.title: Re: Adaptation project for custom fiori app deployed in CF
entry.content:
Hello, 

In the "Project Path" field, you should indicate the path to your MTA (Multi-Target Application) project in your Cloud Foundry environment. This is the location where your application files, configuration files, and other resources are stored.

For example, if your MTA project is located in a folder called "myAdaptationProject" within your Cloud Foundry environment, you would enter the path as:

/cf/myAdaptationProject

Replace "myAdaptationProject" with the actual name of your MTA project folder.

OR if your MTA project is located in a directory called "my-custom-app" within your Cloud Foundry space, the project path would be something like "/my-custom-app".

Make sure that the path you provide is the correct location of your MTA project within your Cloud Foundry environment. If you are unsure of the correct path, you may need to consult your Cloud Foundry documentation or speak with your Cloud Foundry administrator for assistance. 

As for your question about extending Fiori apps, you can indeed create adaptations for your own custom Fiori apps. The ability to extend and adapt Fiori apps is not limited to SAP-provided or SAP partner apps. You can also create adaptations for your own custom Fiori apps that you have developed.

Thank you.

entry.title: Open/Add/Remove buttons Risk in Subprocess are disabled
entry.content:
Hi All,

GRC PC 12 SP24

Although the Subprocess is set 'yes' as Allow local changes, the Risks tab does not have the buttons Open/Add/Remove Risk enabled. 

The above approach is recommended at https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROCESS_CONTROL/f77342ea45c24d3f81032575e6f50d8b/75a39cfc4bc044c4aae3ef45a4969291.html?version=12.0.17 . 

If i open the Risk templates(from Risk Catalog) and then assign a control, then also the control does not show the risk when opened from Central hierarchy

Can you please suggest as to how can a risk be assigned to a Control

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: How do you handle local tax administration?
entry.content:
Hello,

I need some advise on how to administer local taxes other than manually.  We have stores in IN and OH where employees move from one store with a local tax to another store with a different local.  We currently have to administer those type of moves manually and it is not an easy task to keep up with.

Is there an automated way to do this?  Can the system help us automatically change the local based on the store number?

Any advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Rebecca

entry.title: Re: How do I set the order in which code list description...
entry.content: I am pretty sure that this is not possible with CSS

entry.title: ODN number range should be continues for both domestic and export documents
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently i am facing a issue in ODN numbering. My Indian client requirement is to have same ODN number range for both domestic and export documents. Domestic invoice configuration for ODN is already done, now they need ODN for Export.

I have configured ODN for Export invoice and number ranges i have copied from domestic invoice, but the requirement is to have a continuous number range for both Domestic and Export, but when i have tested the export document, the ODN number is not continuous to domestic, two tax invoice numbers with same number is been generated

Domestic invoice

Export Invoice ODN

Please kindly help me in this on urgent basis.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Custom field from Service order doesn't get filled for Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement, that Service order header custom field value should be taken over to Sales order header. I used this business scenario, however the value stays empty for this field in VBAK table. What is wrong?

I am using Search service order application (TBT116MSR) for creation and editing of the ser. orders.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Kyma Integration with SAP Cloud Logging. Part 1: Introduction and shipping Logs
entry.content:
Dear @sarbajeet,

You can use the OpenSearch dashboard’s Dev tools to obtain the information:

  • CAT allocation API offers all disk info:
    • https://opensearch.org/docs/1.3/api-reference/cat/cat-allocation/
  • CAT nodes API offers disk, heap, ram information with current number of data nodes.
    • https://opensearch.org/docs/1.3/api-reference/cat/cat-nodes/
  • CAT indices displays disk usage from index point of view:
    • https://opensearch.org/docs/1.3/api-reference/cat/cat-indices/

We understand that this is a spot check and less attractive than a visualization with history – we are currently looking into such capability and would update once the delivery roadmap is concrete.

We also recommend familiarising with curation policy (mentioned under Caution)

Thanks,

Cloud Logging team

#SAP Cloud logging

entry.title: Re: Q2 new Feature does not work for me - Repointing a mo...
entry.content:
Hi Mirko,
Could you check that the story includes charts and tables with measures selected in the builder panel ?
There is a known issue when story only includes a table with no filter on the measures. This will be fixed in a future release.
Thanks
François

entry.title: Re: SQL SAP Anywhere Version 17 WORKGROUP
entry.content: High Availability (mirroring) and  Read-only Scale out require Advanced Edition licensing.   See SAP SQL Anywhere Editions | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Metaverse Technology – An intersection of trending concepts and technologies
entry.content:
If you want to do Web3 & Blockchain with deep native integration to SAP Products

all you have to do is:

. Get a SAP BTP Trial Account

. Get the SAP BTP Kyma Trial enabled

. Push the "atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP" atkrypto/atkrypto-server-for-sap - Docker Image | Docker Hub  to your SAP BTP Kyma Trial runtime, and start using it.

This is a Public Blockchain Server (meaning you can create as many Blockchains as you want) which is running on atkrypto server for SAP on the SAP BTP Kyma Trial right now:

https://atkrypto-v1.c-7541a80.kyma.ondemand.com/

get Postman and create Blockchains, add Blocks, read Blocks

With this, you have a Blockchain Server, where you can make any kind of Blockchain, Tokenise anything, Developer SDK, all API enabled.

Any questions how to do it, let me know 🚀

Andy Silvey.

entry.title: Re: Loading data to Planning enabled Model through Analyt...
entry.content: Thank you for the explanation. It's just difficult to analyze what might go wrong here. But in general，personally I would not recommend this approach as it can be tricky and not really performing for a bit larger data scale.

entry.title: QM10/QM11/QM12 No filter can be set after upgrade on Version 2023
Re: IDOC Interface to send GR and Inbound info from S4 to...
entry.content:
Hi Hithesh,

Functionalities via IDOC are available, but only with limited functions in EWM.
I think WMMBXY is not within the circle of IDoc types that can be used together with EWM.

Best regards,
Eszter

entry.title: Setting up Tricentis Cloud Test Automation in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Preparation and Setup

Here you can find the corresponding Fiori tile "Set up Tricentis Test Automation for SAP".
Click on the tile.

Usage Rights

If you are entitled to a license to use Tricentis Test Automation for SAP, you can simply check the box here and click on Save.

A tenant is now created automatically. You can see the work progress live.

Successful configuration

If everything is successful, you will see the following screen:

SAP standard modules

You can use/reuse SAP standard modules.
Select the desired modules in the library on the left.

Have fun using Tricentis Cloud Test Automation for SAP.

entry.title: Re: Metaverse Technology – An intersection of trending concepts and technologies
entry.content:
and this is what it looks like when you have atkrypto Mobile Server installed on Android and you run a Distributed Ledger from the SAP BTP Kyma Trial to an Android Smartphone (this is running right now):

Andy.

entry.title: Re: Third party delivery process for subcontracting raw m...
entry.content:
Hello,

I find some materials to help you in this process:

Outbound Delivery (S/4HANA)

Explaining Outbound Processing

SAP S/4 HANA Change Outbound Delivery

SAP S/4HANA Enterprise Management - Sub-contracting with Serial Number Management

Warehouse Outbound Processing with Handling Unit Management - SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: IDOC Interface to send GR and Inbound info from S4 to external system
entry.content: IDocs are not synchronous by nature, and EWM should already report any GR to the S4 side automatically. If you need some form of interface to an external system, then probably best to check how to trigger from the S4 side once a receipt is reported from the EWM side.

entry.title: .NET USING SAP HANA DB REAL_VECTOR
entry.content:
Hello,

when i create a table with .NET i get the error: "sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "REAL_VECTOR": line 1 col 50 (at pos 50)'"

I think i have the newest version of libadonet.dll (2.20.22.39682).

Here my example code:

var connection = new HanaConnection(_connectionString);
connection.Open();

var command = new HanaCommand($"CREATE COLUMN TABLE VECTORTAB (ID NVARCHAR, DATA REAL_VECTOR);", connection);
command.ExecuteNonQuery();

connection.Close();

Is it not possible to use the new Datatype REAL_VECTOR?

Greetings,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: QM10/QM11/QM12 No filter can be set after upgrade on Version 2023
entry.content: Did you verify that there are not any authorization failures?

entry.title: Re: Unable to release repair confirmation for billing
entry.content:
Hi,

Based on your provided information, I am not able to figure out the cause of the error. Please create an incident if you think the error comes out of a bug in the standard program. 

Warm regards,

Dequan

entry.title: Re: Adding auto increase number custom field to Sales Ord...
entry.content:
Hello 

I will try to answer this if it helps.

Based on your requirements, you are on the right track by using the BAdI 'SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD' to modify the header custom fields in Sales Documents. However, the BAdI is triggered every time the Sales Order screen is accessed, which is why the number keeps increasing even when you only enter the Sales Order screen just for looking information.

To answer your questions:

For In-App Extensibility,

1. Unfortunately, there is no condition that can control to trigger the BAdI logic when only the 'Save' button is clicked. The BAdI is triggered every time the Sales Order screen is accessed.

2. There is no built-in auto-increase number function that can be used in any BAdI. You have to manually code this functionality.

For Developer Extensibility,

1. Yes, it is possible to add an auto-increase number custom field using ADT (ABAP Development Tools). You can create a new data element with a domain of type NUMC (numeric text) and specify the number of digits you want. Then, in your ABAP code, you can use the CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT function module to convert the numeric value to a string with leading zeros.

Here is a sample code snippet for your reference:

"abap
DATA: lv_number TYPE numc10,
lv_string TYPE string.

lv_number = 1. "Your auto-increase number

CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
EXPORTING
input = lv_number
IMPORTING
output = lv_string.

CONCATENATE 'TEST-' lv_string INTO runningnum.
salesdocument_extension_out-yy1_runningno_sdh = runningnum.
"

Please note that this is a simple example and you may need to adjust it according to your requirements. Also, remember to handle exceptions properly in your code to avoid runtime errors.

This is based on my knowledge.


Thank you.

entry.title: External cash desk - CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using external cash desk for posting collection from customers through middleware. We are using  "CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In" service for posting collection. The service is asynchronous and hence it gets collection posted however, we are not getting response against it. 

Do we have any option to make it synchronous instead of asynchronous service so that we can provide response with reference to the collection received through middelware.

Please let me know is there any option.

Regards,

Narendra

entry.title: Re: Extract SAP long text into SQL server
entry.content:
Hi 

as far as I know you cannot convert that RAW texts with any external tool. You may use an ABAP report and function module READ_TEXT to read the SAPScript texts one by one into an internal table and then store that data somewhere. On the Target site you can use another ABAP report and function module SAVE_TEXT to store the data.

BR

Frank

entry.title: Re: Code Descriptions in Reports out of EC
entry.content: Hi Dipesh is this only in Story Reports? We dont have that YET!!

entry.title: Re: Send discount price ( SD price ) to third party system
entry.content: I hear you but can I schedule sending COND_A idoc to a third party ?

entry.title: Re: To trigger BAdI logic when only click 'Save' button i...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Based on my understanding, 

I think you can achieve this by setting a condition in the implementation of the BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM. You can check the action being performed by the user and trigger the logic only when the action is "Save".

You can use the parameter ACTION in the method MODIFY_PO_ITEM of the BAdI to check the action being performed. If the action is "Save", then you can execute your custom logic.

Here is an example:

DATA: lv_action TYPE char20.

lv_action = io_data->get_action( ).

IF lv_action = 'SAVE'.
" Trigger your custom logic here
ENDIF.

By checking the value of the parameter ACTION, you can ensure that your custom logic is only triggered when the user clicks the Save button in the Purchase Order.

Let me know if this works.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SIGNAVIO Feature Request:Possibility to create a new...
entry.content:
Hi Tiago,

Thanks for using our product and providing a feedback!

I have shared it with the product team as a feature request. Hopefully, it can soon be available for documentations. However, what is available at the moment is that you can download the existing/created document in an Excel template.

Kind regards,
Taleh

entry.title: Re: QM10/QM11/QM12 No filter can be set after upgrade on...
entry.content: Unlikely. Myself have full authorisation.

entry.title: connection between sap btp and a s/4 hana cloud private system
entry.content:
Hello to everyone,
I have been reading this course: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/extending-sap-s-4hana-with-sap-build-apps-and-key-user-extensibility/establishing-connectivity-between-sap-s-4hana-cloud-and-sap-btp_f3d6df41-c36c-450b-8ae8-79534e043fa1 . 

and many doubts arose.
The first one is: Do I have to have the Communication Systems application implemented, in order to make the connection between BTP and my S/4 HANA system?
the second doubt is: Can it be that to connect BTP with S/4 HANA Cloud Private and S/4 HANA on-premise I have to use Cloud Connector, but for S/4 HANA Cloud Public I don't have to use it?

Help please, I am lost with this.
Thanks and greetings to all,

Thank you all.

M.Hassan

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,
Great. my first query is running with this filter
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'2024-06-10T00:00:00'))

But my final query should be like mentioned in my first question, how to be it look like?
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00}'))- ${property.p_daysInPast}' and CreationDate le datetime'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00}')

note: ${property.p_daysInPast} value should be in days ( ex: 3 or 5..)

Could you please also suggest how it would be like?

Thank you 

Sateesh

Thanks

 

LP

entry.title: Old Instances Persisting in SAP Build Process Visibility Scenario After Redeployment
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently, I encountered a backend issue in my workflow within SAP Build Process Automation, which caused many instances to crash. After resolving the problem and redeploying the process, the old instances are still visible in the process visibility scenario, rendering it ineffective.

I've tried several solutions, including:

  • Deleting all "older" released versions of the process
  • Redeploying the process visibility scenario
  • Clearing the processed data in the monitoring settings of the SAP Build lobby

Despite these efforts, the old instances always reappear after processing new data. They are no longer visible in the monitoring of the process/workflow itself, yet they persist in the visibility scenario.

Does anyone have any hints on how to fix this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Does Sap data intelligence has count_distinct function
entry.content:
How can we implement count_distinct function in SAP data intelligence , as there is no direct function available like in SAP BODS.

Thanks

entry.title: Mass filtering in SAP Signavio?
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a way that I can include 50 order numbers at once in the filtering in SAP Signavio? I have a case where we have 50 to 100 sales orders in an S4 app that are delivered too late. I would like to view them all together in Signavio and analyze common problems.
I have them as a list. Is there a way to filter them all together in one go in Signavio? or do I have to enter them all manually one by one.

Greetings Niels

entry.title: Call for Lectures meccanica feminale 2025
entry.content:
Winter School - Submit your proposal now!

The University of Stuttgart looking for female lecturers for courses:

AI, industry 4.0, XR, CAD, Python and other programming languages, app development, renewable energy, energy management & energy storage, environmental engineering, autonomous driving & electromobility, material science, construction methodology, requirements engineering, simulation & modelling, measurement & systems technology, control procedures, bionic & biomedicine, signal processing, information & communication technologies, aerospace technology, mechatronics, ...

and lecturers for social skill courses:

knowledge and time management, self-confident appearance, voice training, mentoring, career planning, technical English, conflict management, work life balance, reconciling family and career, ...

Submissions are possible until 16/06/2024.

Call for Lectures - Scientifica

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: Use the password that you set in Step-8

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management service generally available
entry.content:
Hello,

technically the TMS instance can run in any subaccount. So you could run it for example in your QUA environment.

As a best practice we recommend to set up a separate 'administrative' subaccount in which you can run services like cTMS which (normally) only exist once in your landscape. This makes user management potentially easier, because you could give access to this subaccount only to people with administrative tasks in cTMS (or other services running there). 

Business users who have access to QUA for testing would not even see the administrative subaccount or the cTMS instance.

If, however, you have a strong overlap between people doing testing in QUA and people managing transports it is totally ok to put cTMS into the QUA subaccount.

Please also check the BTP best practices guide on SAP Help: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/best-practices/considerations-for-account-model-setup?version=Cloud

Kind regards
Harald

entry.title: Call Service before fetching metadata in Fiori Elements ListReport page
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement that I need to call SuccessFactors from a Fiori app hosted on our on premise gateway system. The SuccessFactors API is protected using Oauth2, and today we have an odata service on our GW system that authenticates the currently logged on user and returns a valid JWT token, that the Fiori app can then use to call SF Odata Services.

This works fine in custom applications, where we have control over the services and can add the JWT to our SF Services. 

Is there a way to do the same in Fiori Elements, can I somewhere call our "authentication service" and add the JWT to the mainService?
#

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content: @satsunros it would look something like this, but you would have to figure out how to determine your starting date because I don't know what bounds you are trying to use. The following expression would give all orders between the beginning of the year and today - $filter=CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate ge datetime'2024-01-01T:00:00:00' and CreationDate le datetime'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd}T00:00:00')

entry.title: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry XXX does not exist
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
For context:
I'm working on an ECC6 environment.
I'm trying to create a WM movement and then link it to a MM movement.
This movement will be called with the BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.
So I've created the movement in SPRO. I then linked the movement through the SM30 on view V_156SC_VC as I needed to add a line and couldn't find any other solution.

My problem:
When calling the BAPI, the following error comes up “Check table T156SY: entry 311 X X Q B _ P does not exist” and indeed the table row doesn't exist and I can't find a way to fill it. Either via SPRO or SM30.

Do you know how to do this?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to embedd a mashup (HTML , no port binding) with auto sizing
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I created a mashup for a SAC report and added this one to a custom work center (HTML, no port binding, full wide, height 100%). This works fine in general. The issue I ´m faced with is, that I need scroll bars up-down, left to right to display the content. If I change the zoom in C4C from 100% to 90% it looks perfectly good, but the normal user has as standard 100% zoom. How could I effect, that whatever zoom is set up in CRM my mashup display is always fullscreen in the window with no scroll bars.

 

Could someone advise?

KR Feli

entry.title: Re: Fast entry TAB in Prodution order
entry.content: Dear experts, can anyone please reply.

entry.title: Re: Assign IM mouvement to WM - Check table T156SY: entry...
entry.content:
Did you try SM30 on view V_T156SY (or a small abap report) 

  • mainenance views V_156SC_VC, V_T156SY and V_156X_VC can be relevant to your requirement,
    BUT
  • ⚠️ NB: this is a 'system table, edited only by SAP, change = modification' ⚠️ So basically you shouldn't perform modifications that require to change this table
